EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Authentication of the user {object.account.name} from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is rejected on host {event_src.host}
Authentication of the user {object.account.name} from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is rejected on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Authentication of a user from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is rejected on host {event_src.host}
Authentication of a user from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is rejected on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
